scripts.icons: tauri icon ../web/public/icon.svg && cd src-tauri/icons && rm -f 32x32.png 64x64.png Square30x30Logo.png Square44x44Logo.png Square71x71Logo.png Square89x89Logo.png Square107x107Logo.png StoreLogo.png && find android -name '*.xml' -exec sh -c 'tail -c1 "$1" | grep -q . && printf "\n" >> "$1"' _ {} \;
